seed_rate.notes: Higher seed rates are recommended for bold-seeded Kabuli varieties.

sowing.soil_conditions: Deep, well-drained loamy soils. Avoid saline/alkaline fields.

irrigation.notes: Light irrigation promotes healthy branching. Excess water causes excessive vegetative growth.
Critical water phase. Ensure crop is not subjected to drought stress.

fertilizer.notes: Rhizobium inoculation of seeds is highly recommended before sowing.

maturity_indicators: Leaves turn yellow and begin to shed
Pods turn light brown/yellow and seeds rattle when pods are shaken
harvest.harvest_method: Pulling up plants manually or cutting with sickle
harvest.notes: Thresh plants after sun drying for 5-6 days. Target storage moisture is 10-12%.
